results.title: Mirum Pharmaceuticals and Incyte Announce Pivotal Late-Breaking Results for Zilurgisertib in Fibrodysplasia Ossificans Progressiva Accepted for Presentation at ENDO 2026
results.description: FOSTER CITY, Calif. & WILMINGTON, Del.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Mirum and Incyte Announce Pivotal Late-Breaking Results for Zilurgisertib in Fibrodysplasia Ossificans Progressiva Accepted for ENDO 2026

results.title: Mirum Pharmaceuticals and Incyte Announce Pivotal Late-Breaking Results for Zilurgisertib in Fibrodysplasia Ossificans Progressiva Accepted for Presentation at ENDO 2026
results.description: Mirum Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: MIRM) and Incyte (Nasdaq: INCY) today announced that pivotal Phase 2 results from the PROGRESS study evaluating zilurgisertib, an investigational ALK2 inhibitor, in patients with fibrodysplasia ossificans progressiva (“FOP”) will be presented at ENDO 2026, the Endocrine Society’s annual meeting, taking place June 13-16, 2026, in Chicago, Illinois.
